name: Deel
tagline: Global payroll and compliance for remote teams
description: Deel is a global HR platform that handles payroll, compliance, and contractor management across 150+ countries. It lets companies hire anyone, anywhere without setting up local entities.
cons: Can be complex for simple use cases
use_cases: You're hiring full-time employees in countries where you have no legal entity and need an Employer of Record to handle compliance
Your company works with international contractors and needs compliant contracts, tax forms, and fast payment in local currencies
You're scaling a remote-first team across multiple countries and want a single platform for payroll, benefits, and equipment provisioning
You need to onboard international hires quickly without months of local legal setup in each new country
